summary: Detailed review of Step 2a (World Bible) in the Video Pipeline focusing on historical accuracy. Identifies 6 key problems: LLM guesses era without verification, prompt is too vague about accuracy requirements, architecture/props schemas are too loose, no retry mechanism, duplicate civilian_clothing field. Proposes 5 prioritized improvements (P0-P4) including exact date enforcement, historical_note fields, structured architecture schema, retry logic, and field deduplication.
